items.title: [正面] 我不知道评论区都在喷什么，首先说它卡池是米哈游那套，我就想问了30发保底还不行？非要白送你？而且爆率...
items.summary: 我不知道评论区都在喷什么，首先说它卡池是米哈游那套，我就想问了30发保底还不行？非要白送你？而且爆率我就不说比米哈游高多少了，还喷氪金比率，谁逼你氪金了，你到底玩没玩这个游戏，这个福利力度都够策划写进我族谱里了，每日任务送一发常驻和50银芯，关卡每关给好多银芯（抽空用）还给一发常驻，修复bug补偿送你一自选常驻，这要是个垃圾圈钱游戏也就罢了，主要是他画风也确实精美，能看出来用心，音乐也很有感觉，剧情不说多好但也属于那种很不错的，喷人家走格子玩法还拿他和绝区零作比较，不是你脑子没问题吧，绝区零3a动作战斗游戏，这tm是卡牌游戏，能一样吗，卡牌游戏还有什么更好的肉鸽玩法植入的方法吗，还喷角色有小男孩，小男孩怎么你了，你老子啊，出生就是成男。你带脑子玩游戏了吗乱喷，要不是这是个小众游戏我都怀疑你是对家找的人机。克系元素确实不多，但抛开这点其实游戏也没什么好喷的，说完全体要16个的你就非要满命满精？这是最有可能不氪金满命满精的游戏了，你们还要怎样，策划就是福利太多给你们吃饱了撑着你们了，你再找一个福利这么高的精良游戏我看看，还骂人家圈外国人钱，圈钱也圈不到你身上，外国人没说什么你叫上来

items.title: [正面] First off: this is a port of a mobile gacha game....
items.summary:
First off: this is a port of a mobile gacha game.

Still interested...?

Good, because the art, story and gameplay are really good!

[b]What's the theme of the game like:[/b]
Morimens features a dark fantasy story with many elements of other fandoms like crime, noir, lovecraft/cthulhu, splatter/gore, sprinkled with anime tropes to lighten the mood.

[b]Gameplay:[/b]
You collect so called "Awakers" from currently four different factions. With a team, of four Awakers you solve "crimes". Every level is like a boardgame where you move your avatar, sprinkled across that board are enemies, events, shops, doors, portals etc. up until the endboss of the stage. Afterwards you get a rating which depends on your overall performance and tasks you did while playing the mission.  

Fights are done with cards, best described like Slay the Spire but with a team of four.

Between and in missions the story is told per text. No voice, just music and sound effects.

[b]Whats the story like:[/b]
I don't want to spoiler anyone but it is well worth it. I came for the art but stayed for the story. Well worth your time, very dark and gnarly, but also funny. 

Overall I can recommend Morimens to everyone that likes card battlers, a mature story and (or isn't opposed to) anime characters.

[b]Warning:[/b] the english version is currently only translated with chat gpt - and it shows! Not a deal-breaker for me but this should really be adressed in future updates. Characters switch pronouns every few missions, skills have sometimes up to 3 different names for the same thing etc.

items.title: [正面] 游戏是好游戏，不过连歪真的很难受，祝大家都欧
